name: opencode-anycli
description: Bundle that runs the opencode AI coding agent through the locally installed cline CLI
author: Project Maintainers

scripts.build: for d in packages/*; do (cd "$d" && npm run build) || exit 1; done
scripts.test: for d in packages/*; do (cd "$d" && npm run test) || exit 1; done
scripts.typecheck: for d in packages/*; do (cd "$d" && npm run typecheck) || exit 1; done
